verses.text: Hauhna sangin min hoihna deihhuai zaw a, kham leh ngun sangin mi' hong thusimna deihhuai zaw hi
A hau a zawng a kilamdan'na omlo a, a nih tuakun Topa' bawlsa ahi uh hi
Mipilte in a lauhuai thu mu thei-in pelh uh a, mi mawkmawkte in phusuakin thuak uh hi
Kiniamkhiat-a Topa zahtakna thaman in hauhna, minthan'na, leh khan'sauna ahi hi
Migilote' lampi-ah thang kisiahin so kidawh a, mipilte in tua lampi pelh uh hi
Naupang khat a neulai-in lampi man tawnsak lecin a teek dongin lampial nawnlo ding hi
Mihaute in mizawngte uk a, leitawi a late pen a piate' sila a suak hi
Thumanlo khaici a vawhte in lungkhamna tuak uh a, amau' hehna ciangduai amau' tung mah tukik ding hi
A cingh mi in mizawngte an pia a, amah in thupha ngahkik hi
Mi kiphasakte hawlkhia lecin kitotna leh kisimmawhna bei pah ding hi
Kamsiamna in kumpipa' lawm hong suaksak a, ahi zongin Topa in lungsim takpi a deih hi
Topa in thuman mite kem a, ahi zongin thuzuau gente a lawnthal hi
Mi thadahte a inn-ah lumlum a, “Pua pial lehang humpi'n hong hih kha'n teh,” ci uh hi
Numei tungah mawhna pen thangzak bang hi a, tua thangah a awkte tungah Topa a heh hi
Naupangte a hai gamtat a ngeina hi a, deihtakin pangbetna in mihoih suaksak thei hi
Hauhnop manin mihaute letsong pia leeng kizawn'lawh a, hauhnop manin mizawngte' neihsa laksak lehang zong kihauhlawh tuanlo hi.
Na bil uh hong ngatin mipilte' thugen ngai un la, ka hong hilh pilna thute na lungsim uhah lutsak un
Na lungsim uhah ciingin zang thei le uh cin, na lung uh dam tawntung ding hi
Tua hi leh Topa muan'in na nei ding uh a, tuni-in note' phattuamna ding kam a pau ka suak ding hi
Thuhilhna leh pilna thu nam sawmthum hih lai-ah note-a' dingin ka gelh a
thuman a kan dingin note hong sawlte' tungah thuman bang hiam cih na genkik theihna dingun thuman na theihna ding uh ka deihna ahi hi.
Bangmah hong cih zolo ding cihna hangin nuamtak sa-in mizawngte' neihsa mawk suh kei un la, zumah khia-in mawk bawlsiat kei un
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in amaute pan'pih ding a, amau a bawlsiate tungah phu a laksak ding hi.
A hehbaih mite tawh kipawl kei un la, a lungtom mite tawh kikhawl kei un
Amau' hoihlohnate na zuihkhak lohna dingun na kidop kei uh leh note in zong na awklawh khading uh hi.
Midangte' leiba lohsak dingin kamciamin leiba tavuan lakha kei un
A leiba lohsakzo kei le uh cin na lupna nangawn uh hong kidawhkhiatsak ding hi.
Na pu na pate' phuhsa gisuang cikmah hunin khin kei un.
A nasepna-ah a siam mahmah mi na theikha uh hiam? Amah in mi mawkmawkte' na semlo ding a, kumpite' na sem ding hi.
